title: Zoni's Companions
description: A mod that adds pretty cool Companions!
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This mod adds items you can craft in order to summon the new Companions!
The Companions can be equipped with weapons and armor to help you in battle.

If they perish don't worry! As long as you have an empty Summon Device in your inventory they will return safely, and you can summon them again.

You can use the Companion Pendant to make them follow or stop following you. 

Each Companion have a special ability!

Companions:
- Jorge - character from [JBA](https://vndb.org/v43381)
> - Each consecutive hit increases the level of strength
- Niomus - character made by [@magstheoc](https://x.com/magstheoc)
> - Each hit recover HP
- Nagako - character made by [@magstheoc](https://x.com/magstheoc)
> - Each hit inflicts poison and wither
- Bocchi - from the Anime Bocchi the Rock
> - Gives allies regeneration
- Asuna - from the Anime SAO
> - Has increased attack and movement speed
- Eugeo - from the Anime SAO
> - Makes opponents unable to move
- Arlecchino - from the game Genshin Impact
> - Each hit recover HP
- Hu Tao - from the game Genshin Impact
> - Deals more damage when has lower HP
- Jean - from the game Genshin Impact
> - Yeets mobs into the air
- Klee - from the game Genshin Impact
> - Has a chance to create an explosion
- Eula - from the game Genshin Impact
> - Has a chance to create an explosion
- Melusine - from the Fate/Series
> - Breaks shields and gains strength
- Astolfo - from the Fate/Series
> - Each hit inflicts weakness and slowness
 - Mash - from the Fate/Series
> - Has permanent resistance and taunts enemies
 - Zani - from the game Wuthering Waves
> - Makes enemies take more damage
 - Derek (d3rLord3) - from the ARG World that doesn't exist
> - Marks enemies, marked enemies take more damage

You can use Recover Pills to heal your Companions.

Theres also the Advanced Summon Device, that let's you catch and summon any mob at any time! And keeps all the mob information!



If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
